newsletters.subject: Why cultivating agency matters more than cultivating skills in the AI era | Max Schoening (Head of Product, Notion)
newsletters.summary: Max Schoening (Head of Product, Notion) discusses why high agency matters more than technical skills in the AI era. Key topics: vibe coding quality gap, the 'first 10% is free' rule, 'tiny core' theory of great products, Notion's 'drive it like it's stolen' culture, Jevons Paradox for AI software demand, and the role of Claude Code in bridging design-to-production workflows.
recommended_actions: Enrich/wiki-update: claude-code skill page with Notion workflow reference
Create wiki concept page: 'agency-vs-skills-ai-era' or add to existing concepts
Create concept: 'vibe-coding-quality-gap' (Jevons Paradox applied to AI software)
Link to existing entity pages: notion, max-schoening (if doesn't exist, create skeleton)

newsletters.subject: Gemini Gets to Work, Claude's Big Pull, and OpenAI Unchained
newsletters.summary: Comprehensive AI industry analysis covering: Google Gemini Workspace integration (native Docs/Sheets/Slides generation, UK Memories, competitor chat import tools), Anthropic enterprise dominance ($30B ARR, 40% enterprise LLM spend, 54% coding share, Opus 4.7, Claude Security, Creative Coalition with 9 professional tool connectors), OpenAI multi-cloud pivot (AWS Bedrock, Symphony open-source spec for autonomous agents, reduced compute commitments $600B through 2030), humanoid manufacturing scale (Figure 1 robot/hour, Unitree $4,290 dual-arm, RobotEra 85% efficiency), and screen-aware AI interfaces.
recommended_actions: CRITICAL: Update Anthropic entity page with $30B ARR, 40% enterprise share, 54% coding share data
CRITICAL: Update OpenAI entity page with multi-cloud pivot, Symphony spec, $600B compute projection
Create wiki concept page: 'symphony-autonomous-agents' (open-source spec for agent orchestration via issue trackers)
Update Claude Code page with Creative Coalition connectors (Adobe, Blender, Autodesk, Ableton, SketchUp)
Update Google Gemini entity page with Workspace native file generation
